name: watchtower
desc: Watchtower is a simple AI-powered penetration testing automation CLI tool that leverages LLMs and LangGraph to orchestrate agentic workflows that you can use t…
descFull: Watchtower is a simple AI-powered penetration testing automation CLI tool that leverages LLMs and LangGraph to orchestrate agentic workflows that you can use to test your websites locally. Generate useful pentest reports for your websites.
